product.name: 2 Handle Ceramic Valve
product.productOverview: This two-handle ceramic valve features brass construction for durability and reliability. When paired with a two-handle wall-mount bathroom sink faucet trim, this wall-mounted valve delivers separate control of hot and cold water.
product.featuresAndBenefits: 2.2 gal/min (8.3 l/min) maximum flow rate [max at 60 psi. Dual-control wall-mounted. KOHLER ceramic disc valves exceed industry longevity standards for a lifetime of durable performance.
